package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for main_or_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_server_bootstrap_and_business_config: Entrypoints that do too much without startup composition helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule079NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule079NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule079NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario079Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule079NegativeService, input Rule079NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
